name: Iso11783IL_ManipulateMessage
title: Iso11783IL_ManipulateMessage
syntax: long Iso11783IL_ManipulateMessage( dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue, qword dataMask, qword dataValue ); // form 1
description: Modifies the content of a message generated and sent by the interaction layer.
The message to manipulate is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use Iso11783IL_ResetManipulatedMessage or Iso11783IL_ResetAllManipulatedMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be modified.
